name: Lost Deal Review
description: When a deal is lost, creates a review task for the sales manager to analyze what went wrong.
descriptionAr: عند خسارة صفقة، ينشئ مهمة مراجعة للمدير لتحليل أسباب الخسارة.

config.title: Review lost deal: {{title}}
config.description: Deal {{title}} was lost. Review the deal history, identify reasons, and document lessons learned.

config.title: Deal lost: {{title}}
config.body: {{title}} ({{value}} {{currency}}) marked as lost. A review task has been created.
